memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
This memorial is dedicated to my ancestor Sir Thomas Bardolf, 2nd Lord Bardolf.
He was the son and heir, of Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolf of Wormegay and Isabel de Aguillon, Heiress of Addington. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Bardolf II於1282年10月4日出生在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東時，他的父親Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph23歲，母親Isabel d'Aguillon24歲。他於大約1305年與Agnes de Grandison在瑞士波格a特爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年12月15日在英國諾廷加姆爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Bardolf II于1282年10月4日出生在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph23岁，母亲Isabel d'Aguillon24岁。他于大约1305年与Agnes de Grandison在瑞士波格a特爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年12月15日在英国諾廷加姆爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Bardolf II was born on 4 October 1282, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, was 23 and his mother, Isabel d'Aguillon, was 24. He married Agnes de Grandison about 1305, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 December 1329, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Bardolf II est né le 4 octobre 1282, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel d'Aguillon, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Grandison environ 1305, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1329, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Bardolf II am 4. Oktober 1282 in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph 23 und seine Mutter Isabel d'Aguillon 24. Er hat um 1305 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz Agnes de Grandison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1329 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Bardolf II è nato il il 4 ottobre 1282 nel Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabel d'Aguillon, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Grandison circa 1305, nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1329, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bardolf IIが1282年10月4日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolphは23歳，母Isabel d'Aguillonは24歳であった。約1305年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルでAgnes de Grandisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年12月15日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bardolf II(이)가 1282년 10월 4일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel d'Aguillon(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1305년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 Agnes de Grandison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 12월 15일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.4 October 1282–15 December 1329: 4 de outubro de 1282–15 de dezembro de 1329
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Bardolf II nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1282, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel d'Aguillon, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Grandison aproximadamente 1305, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1329, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Bardolf II родился 4 октября 1282 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel d'Aguillon, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Grandison около 1305 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 декабря 1329 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.4 October 1282–15 December 1329: 4 de octubre de 1282–15 de diciembre de 1329
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Bardolf II nació el 4 de octubre de 1282, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel d'Aguillon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes de Grandison aproximadamente 1305, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1329, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
